alt: Diagram showing ITS Career Areas in the center with circles branching off in for Operations, Data Science, Marketing & Communications, Software & Cybersecurity, Engineering, Research, and Policy & Planning (in clockwise order).
notes: This image was from the Career Opportunities in Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) paper. However, the image we're currently using is a little different than what they use in the paper. Not sure if we want to update ours or not.
